blur_detection.description: The text is sharp and clearly defined with no apparent blur.

contrast_assessment.description: Excellent contrast between text and background, ensuring clear text recognition.

glare_identification.description: No glare or bright spots detected that obscure text.

water_stains.description: No water stains or discolorations affecting document readability.

tears_or_folds.description: No visible tears, creases, folds, or wrinkles on the document.

cut_off_detection.description: No document edges are cut off, and the image frame includes all important portions.

missing_sections.description: No missing sections or incomplete parts of the receipt/invoice.

obstructions.description: No objects, fingers, shadows, or other elements obstructing document content.

classification.error_type: File location is not same as project's location
classification.reasoning: The document contains multiple fields that align with the expense schema, including supplier, transaction amount, transaction date, payment method, and item description. The presence of these fields, along with the clear indication of a completed payment, confirms it as an expense document. The expense type is classified as 'travel' due to the nature of the service (ride-hailing). The document location is identified as South Korea based on the currency (KRW) and other contextual clues, which does not match the expected location of Japan.

schema_field_analysis.expense_identification_reasoning: The document contains 5 out of 8 required fields, including evidence of payment completion, actual amounts charged, and payment confirmation, thus meeting the criteria for an expense document.

extraction.special_notes: Fares are calculated based on boarding time, meaning the time you boarded the vehicle to the time you got off. The fare is dynamically adjusted based on real-time analysis of request volume.

validation_result.compliance_summary: The receipt has multiple compliance issues including missing supplier address, supplier VAT number, customer name, invoice number, tax amount, and tax rate. Additionally, location city and country are missing. These issues need to be addressed to ensure full compliance with the specified standards.
